title: Exallage auricularia
taxonomy: Exallage auricularia is classified within the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. It belongs to the genus Exallage, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Rubiaceae. Exallage auricularia is further classified within the tribe Vanguerieae, a group of flowering plants that are closely related to the genus Psychotria. The species is native to Madagascar, a large island nation in the Indian Ocean. Further classification of Exallage auricularia may include its placement within a particular species group or series within the tribe Vanguerieae.
